steps.title: Fastest path: mark the figure first
steps.content: Mark the given angle relationships on the figure first: equal angles, vertical angles, supplementary angles, parallel-line angles, and triangle sums of $180^\circ$. Most of these questions become a short angle chase once the givens are marked.

steps.title: Recognize similar triangles from constant side ratios
steps.content:
When all three pairs of corresponding sides share the same ratio, the triangles are similar.

Given: $$\frac{AB}{DE} = \frac{BC}{EF} = \frac{AC}{DF} = 3$$
Therefore triangle ABC ~ triangle DEF, with vertex correspondence: A ↔ D, B ↔ E, C ↔ F.

steps.title: Apply the property: corresponding angles are equal
steps.content:
In similar triangles, angles at corresponding vertices are equal. Since A corresponds to D:
$$\angle EDF = \angle BAC = 20^{\circ}$$
The measure of angle EDF is 20 degrees.
